title: Bouquet³: Corrupted Shorks
description: A resourcepack that replaces Guardians with Corrupted Sharks at 50% chance.
body:
This resource pack replaces Guardians with Corrupted Shorks at 50% (25% regular shorks, 25% hammerhead shork).
### What do I need to load this resource pack properly?
- _**You need both Entity Model Features(EMF) and ETF(Entity Texture Features) or OptiFine**_ to load this resource pack. If you are using Optifine, please turn on Custom Entity Models. Otherwise there won't be any shorks swimming around.
- You have to make sure that this resource pack is on top of other resource packs that add Guardian model.
### What does this resource pack do?
Add Shorks. This silly ahh thing:
![This silly ahh thing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df687b783b65c9af5a97908ff27e2620e89a4afb_0.webp)
### Why should I install it?
If you like sharks, this resource pack adds something like it to the game.
## Latest update: v0.2
- Adding new infected stage for 2 shork variants.

![Infected stage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f1e593e0c37391acda4d1ca31b99e8f9905c5dd.png)
- Adjusting the beam to look like a chain that attached to you.
### Known issues...
- This resource pack might not work properly with some shaders, which causing the shorks to glow... If you are using Complementary Shader, please change the RP Support to labPBR (Recommended), seuspbr or basic to prevent shorks glowing (Personally I think it's kinda cool, more like a feature than a bug heh. But just in case you don't want them to glow...). It looks like this:

![Glowing shork...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/394c4c5013ef3013c5d05d3569629f602dc58768_0.webp)

- I haven't tested it on any versions below 1.21.4, it might not work for older versions.
- This resourcepack will render both Guardian model and Hammerhead Shork model. It might lead to some fps drops and performance issues.
- Due to Minecraft's Guardian hitbox, you might see shorks doing silly things such as no-clipping through blocks.
### What's next?
- I might fix some issues above and add more features in the future. Stay tuned!!!
- More Shorks variants.
- Optimization?
- I'm working on other resource packs that add more fish variants and aquatic plants as well, if I'm not being lazy...
## !! WARNING !!
- **These creatures are not sharks.** This specie is a fantasy creature. **I don't encourage you to approach real sharks or harm them in real life.**
- I suggest running this pack on a good computer.
- Your friends won't see those shorks if they don't have this resourcepack installed. Don't argue with them about seeing these creatures in your game.
- I feel quite lazy recently, probably no updates. I'll come back when I'm done with my collage stuff. Probably bringing more Shork variants to the game.
